# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official Golang image from the Docker Hub
FROM golang:latest AS builder

# Set the working directory in the container
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the Go source code into the container
COPY . .

# Build the Go application
RUN go build -o myservice

# Start a new stage to reduce final image size
FROM alpine:latest

# Copy the compiled binary from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /app/myservice /usr/local/bin/

# Run the binary
CMD ["myservice"]
